approval_notes: Owner explicitly approved merging F002 slice 3 (PR #7) to main and then running the full-epic F002 Level 2 evaluation and flipping F002 passes:true with evidence (prompt: 'checked by humna, looks good, merge and delete branch. after that do full epic F002 eval and flip to true with evidence').

F002 slices 1 (API + PostgreSQL + Alembic), 2 (worker + scheduler PostgreSQL job queue), and 3 (React web frontend served by nginx) are all now merged to main (squash commits #5 6049e7f, #6 bd41c98, #7 9f43e07). This close-out is EVAL-ONLY: it verifies the complete epic together against main and, on a passing verdict, records the ledger flip. No product/source/config code is changed by this increment.
Marking F002 passes:true is permitted only after a fresh-context full-epic Level 2 evaluator records disposition=passed in agent-state/evaluation.json against the merged main state.
objective: Verify the complete F002 epic end-to-end on the merged main branch: the frontend, API, worker, scheduler, and PostgreSQL all start through the canonical scripts, are individually verified (including migrations and database connectivity), remain healthy after a restart, and stop/clean up through the documented commands. On a passing fresh-context Level 2 verdict, flip the F002 feature-ledger entry to passes:true with evaluator-backed evidence.
scope: Run a fresh-context, independent, full-epic Level 2 evaluation of F002 against merged main (9f43e07): all five services (postgres, api, worker, scheduler, web) via the canonical scripts.
Record the full-epic verdict in agent-state/evaluation.json (overwrite) and append an Evaluator entry to agent-state/progress.md.

On disposition=passed, set F002 passes:true, last_verified_at, and verification_evidence in agent-state/feature_list.json (the only feature-ledger fields a non-planner may change), leaving acceptance_steps unchanged.
out_of_scope: Any change to product/source/config/dependency files, docker-compose, scripts, or docs; this increment changes only agent-state files.
Any F003+ domain model, provider adapters, extraction, Z0 classification, or hosting work.
Changing F002 acceptance_steps or any other feature's ledger entry.
Marking any feature other than F002 as passing.
acceptance_criteria: The full stack starts through the canonical script: pwsh -File scripts/stack-up.ps1 brings up postgres, api, worker, scheduler, and web with no manual steps.
docker compose ps reports all five services (postgres, api, worker, scheduler, web) healthy.

Frontend is verified: GET http://localhost:${WEB_PORT}/ returns 200 HTML with the SPA root element, and GET http://localhost:${WEB_PORT}/api/health returns 200 status=ok through the nginx /api/ proxy.
API is verified: /health = 200 and /health/ready = 200 with database ok.
Worker and scheduler are verified: containers healthy, the job queue processes at least one job to done, and worker+scheduler heartbeats are fresh.
Migrations and database connectivity are verified: the app_meta and worker (job_queue + service_heartbeat) migrations are applied against PostgreSQL.
A live run of scripts/stack-smoke.{ps1,sh} passes all checks (all API/database/migration/worker/scheduler/web assertions).
Restart resilience: scripts/stack-down.ps1 (without volumes) then scripts/stack-up.ps1 then scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 passes again.
Regression suites are green on main: scripts/test.ps1 and scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit (ruff, format, pytest, prettier, eslint, secret scan, pip-audit, npm audit -> 0 vulnerabilities).
Stop and clean up through documented commands: scripts/stack-down.ps1 leaves no running services (and -Volumes removes the data volume) as documented in docs/LOCAL_DEVELOPMENT.md.
No unsupported free-tier/zero-cost/Z0 product claim exists in the shipped app copy (product-truth rule).

end_to_end_steps: Confirm HEAD is the merged main tip (9f43e07) and the tree is clean before evaluating.
Bring the full stack up through scripts/stack-up.ps1 and confirm all five services reach healthy.

Run scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 and confirm every check passes (API liveness/readiness, migrations, worker+scheduler health, queue processed, heartbeats, web healthy, web serves SPA, web proxies /api/health).
Independently corroborate GET / and GET /api/health through WEB_PORT, and docker compose ps health for all services.
Restart: scripts/stack-down.ps1 (keep volumes) then scripts/stack-up.ps1 then scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 -> all pass again.
Run scripts/test.ps1 and scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit and confirm both pass end-to-end.
Stop and clean up via scripts/stack-down.ps1 and confirm no services remain running.
negative_tests: With the api service stopped, GET / through the web container still returns 200 while GET /api/health returns a non-200 through the nginx proxy; restarting api recovers /api/health to 200 (proves the seam is real, not mocked).
The committed apps/web/package-lock.json contains no internal-feed hostnames (only public registry.npmjs.org URLs).

risks.data_migration: Eval-only; no schema change. Existing Alembic migrations remain the source of truth and are verified applied.
risks.security_privacy: No secrets printed or committed; secret-scan must stay green. Only agent-state files change.
risks.portability: Evaluation uses the canonical cross-platform scripts; npm uses the approved corp proxy on this device without altering the portable public lockfile.
risks.zero_cost_safety: The stack runs entirely locally via Docker Compose; no hosting or paid dependency. Product-truth: confirm no unsupported free/zero-cost claim in shipped copy.
risks.regression: Full regression (test.ps1 + check.ps1 -NodeAudit) is re-run on main to confirm the merged epic is green.
risks.supply_chain: npm audit must report 0 vulnerabilities on main; lockfile stays public-registry portable.

notes: Owner authorized the merge of PR #7 and the subsequent full-epic F002 evaluation + ledger flip in this session. F002 acceptance_steps are unchanged; only passes/last_verified_at/verification_evidence will be set, and only on a passing fresh-context full-epic Level 2 verdict.
